title: Story Result Schema
description: Authoritative schema for {story_dir}/result.json — implementation outcome plus retrospective.

status.description: Per-story state at the time the result was last written

final_outcome.description: Outcome assigned by the lead after verification (or Decider on escalation)

completed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when status reached done or escalated

files_created.description: Repository-relative paths created by the architect

files_modified.description: Repository-relative paths modified by the architect

tests_added.description: Test counts by kind (e.g. property, parameterized, unit, integration). Free-form keys.

test_counts.description: Total test counts before vs after the story's implementation

resolution_story.description: Story id that will resolve this mock, if known

mocks.description: Temporary mocks introduced; tracked against mocks-registry.json

remediation_rounds.description: Count of architect re-spawns triggered by failed verification

escalation_history.description: One entry per Decider consult during this story

retrospective.description: Architect's free-form retrospective. Either skipped (with reason) or populated (two narrative prompts plus provenance).

harder_than_needed.description: Free-form prose: what made this harder than it needed to be

surprised_by.description: Free-form prose: what surprised you (may be empty string)

scope.description: Project-specific finding (note in code/result.json) vs meta-level finding (about the workflow/factory itself)

outcome.description: Whether this story produced merged commits, was planning-only, or escalated without merge

commits_made.description: Commit SHAs produced during this story (git log baseline..HEAD)

spawn_index.description: 1-based index when the same agent was invoked multiple times

note.description: One-line summary of the absorbed POV (verbatim or lightly cleaned)

absorbed_from.description: POV from agents the architect orchestrated (pbt-dev, review skills) that the architect folded into its own retro

lead_clarifications.description: Q/A pairs from the lead's optional probe (Step 5a). Capped at 3 entries.
